purpose: Prepare safe batch import of full Strategy Deep Dive knowledge base without replacing runtime strategy behavior yet.
current_locked_dependency: v1.4.2 — Strategy Knowledge Base Sample File Import / Verifier Test Set
expected_source_locations: external manual copy from generated strategy deep-dive ZIP

replacement_path.name: Batch Import Preparation / Import Planner
replacement_path.role: Create import plan and permanent batch planning tool.

replacement_path.name: Strategy Knowledge Legacy Mapping / Preservation Audit
replacement_path.role: Map current strategy logic, terms, gates, and learned behavior into the new knowledge-base vocabulary so nothing is lost.

replacement_path.name: Strategy Knowledge Loader Preview
replacement_path.role: Load validated strategy metadata/prose in read-only preview mode.

replacement_path.name: Strategy Recognition Shadow Compare
replacement_path.role: Run current strategy system and new knowledge base side-by-side, compare outputs, and report differences.

replacement_path.name: Strategy Brain Bridge / Opt-In Preview
replacement_path.role: Allow optional use of the strategy knowledge base for report guidance while preserving old strategy fallback.

replacement_path.name: Strategy Brain Default Candidate
replacement_path.role: Make new strategy knowledge the default only if shadow comparison passes and legacy fallback remains available.

replacement_path.name: Strategy Brain Lock
replacement_path.role: Retire old strategy thought process as primary logic only after preservation audit, parity checks, and fallbacks pass.

must_preserve_from_existing_system: current report wording that has proven useful
current Build From Collection B-E routing
current strategy lessons from v0.4 through v1.3
pre_runtime_bridge_gate: All active strategy files pass tools/validate_strategy_knowledge_base.py
Legacy strategy concepts are mapped to strategy_knowledge terms
At least 5 sample files remain PASS
Batch import audit has zero failed files
Shadow compare shows no major regression against current strategy logic
notes: The new knowledge base is intended to replace the current strategy thought process, but replacement must be staged.
The current system should not be removed until the preservation audit and shadow comparison prove that the new system keeps everything useful learned during earlier development.
The strategy prose should inform scoring, classification, cuts, protection, replacements, and report guidance, but should not directly command deck generation.
